stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Tromsø is a city located about 200 miles north of the Arctic Circle in northern Norway.
  • It is the traditional home of many Sámi people.
  • The Sámi Cultural Heritage Center was established by community members in 1985.
  • Its mission is stated on its website: “As a heritage center for the Sámi people and by the Sámi people, we work to provide learning experiences that emphasize Sámi ways of knowing while exploring modern concepts of cultural transmission.”
stem: The student wants to emphasize how long the center has existed. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: Tromsø is home to the Sámi Cultural Heritage Center, which was founded by community members.
According to its website, the Sámi Cultural Heritage Center (founded in the 1980s) works to “emphasize Sámi ways of knowing.”
The Sámi Cultural Heritage Center has served Tromsø since 1985.
Cultural transmission has been one of the central themes of the Sámi Cultural Heritage Center from its founding.

rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. This choice effectively uses information from the notes to emphasize how long the center has existed. It says that the center has existed since 1985.

Choice A is incorrect. This choice doesn’t emphasize how long the center has existed. It doesn’t say when the center was founded. Choice B is incorrect. This choice doesn’t emphasize how long the center has existed. It doesn’t say the exact date of the center’s founding. Choice D is incorrect. This choice doesn’t emphasize how long the center has existed. It doesn’t say when the center was founded.
